_meta.description: Overnight coding/research agent that calls model providers, sandboxes, and secret-backed tools (GitHub/Vercel/staging DB). Budgets are accounting caps over the dev's own rails — Sanction holds no money (control-plane, FUND-1 = no custody).
_meta.amounts: DOLLARS. @sanction/sdk PolicyInput is camelCase dollars; the API stores cents internally.

enforcement.policy.blockedCategories: ENFORCED — authorize denies on exact category match
enforcement.policy.allowedCategories: NOT YET ENFORCED — authorize only checks blockedCategories; allowlist is documentation of intent
enforcement.policy.autoApproveUnderUsd: ENFORCED — at/under this, auto-approve and never escalate (floor wins over escalation)
enforcement.clearance: MODELED ONLY — AgentClearance exists but is not yet enforced at authorize time
enforcement.vault: ENFORCED — exec issues scoped 15-min JWT; inject checks scope + expiry + audit-logs

_meta.apply: Send this 'policy' block to PATCH /v1/wallets/policy with the wallet_id + x-mgmt-key (partial update; omitted fields unchanged), or apply it with the SDK's admin.applyBlueprint(). The 'clearance' and 'vault' blocks are documentation until those control planes are wired. See README.md.
